titleStmt.title: SII 17.759: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 759. (A.R. No. 702 of 1904.) TIRUPPĀṞKAḌAL, WALAJAPET TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the first prākāra, to the right of the entrance in the Kharapurīś vara temple.

The king mentioned in the record as Emmaṇḍalamum koṇḍaruḷiya Dēvēndra vallavan (vallabhan) Sundara-pāṇḍya is evidently identical with Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I. He is also stated to have issued this memorandum (niṉaīppu) from Kaṇṇaṉūr which may be easily identified with Kaṇṇaṉūr near Tiruchirāppaḷḷi, which was till then, the Hoysaḷa capital in the south.

This records the royal order, issued from Kaṇṇaṉūr, registering the gift of 3 vēli of land made free of taxes such as antarāyam, poṉvari etc in Tiruppāṟkadal to Kākkunāyaka-pichchar, as maḍappuṟattu-iṟaiyili
There is another incomplete inscription below this, of the same king, which is apparently connected with this.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Emmaṇṭalamuṅkoṇṭaruḷiya teventira vallavaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevarkku yāṇṭu patinālāvatu nāḷ nūṟṟeṇpattu Oṉ ṟiṉāl kaṇṇaṉūri
l Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu prasātam ceytaruḷiṉapaṭi niṉaippu .kākku nāyaka piccarkku toṇṭaimaṇṭalattu paṭuvūrk koṭṭattu kāvirippākkap paṟṟu tiruppāṟkaṭalil Iva rukku kāṇi
yāṉa nilattil Ivarukku maṭappuṟattu Iṟaiyili Āka Ā ṇi paṭi muṉṟu veli nilam kuṭuttom Innilattukku Innāḷ mutal Eppeṟpaṭṭa varikaḷum kaṭamaikaḷum Antarāyam poṉvari maṟṟum Eppe
ṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum Iṉṉilattāl varumatu tavirttom Iṉṉilam tāṉ veṇṭu payircceytu koṇṭu Iṉṉāḷ mutal cantirātittavarai cellak kallilum cempilum pūtāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka peṟuka veṉ
ṟu veṭṭik koḷka Ippaṭikku nāḷ nūṟṟeṇpattu Oṉṟiṉāl tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉa paṭikku Ippaṭikku putukkuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ peṟṟāṉ vaḻutiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .

tirupuvaṉac cakkaravatti koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya teven tira vallavaṉ cuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku nāyakar tirumuṉpu ceyta vayirāta kku kākku nāyakap piccarkkut toṇṭaimaṇṭa
lattu paṭuvūrkkoṭṭattuk kāvirippākkap paṟṟil tiruppāṟkaṭalil kaṇkāṇi Arai nilattile patiṉālāvatu mātamutal taṉakku maṭappuṟa Iṟaiiliāka Ivvūr Aḷaviṉpaṭi muṉṟu veli nilam ttu Iṉ
Antarāyam poṉvari pperum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Aṉaittu Āyavaṟkaṅkaḷum Upātikaḷum Iḻantu pūtāṉa Iṟaiiliyākavum Ippaṭikku Ivvolai piṭipāṭākak ko
ṇṭu cantirātittavarai celvatāka kallilum cempilum veṭṭik kaikkoṇṭu Aṉupa vikka Ivai taccaṉeṉmali Uṭaiyaāṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 17.759 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
